windows.embed_text: a candle with a candle in the middle | a colorful sculpture on a plate with a wooden base | a colorful sculpture on a table | a colorful cake with a candle on top | a candle with a colorful swirl design on it
windows.embed_text_v2: finished hand-carved decorative candle lit, ornate curling sculpted petals in blue red green white, rainbow swirl carving, silver beads, rotating display, channel watermark
windows.summary_v2: Reveal footage of a finished lit hand-carved multicolored decorative candle slowly rotating to show its sculpted curling petals.

seconds_v2.desc: Lit ornate hand-carved candle, top burning with a tall flame; carved curling petals in blue, red and white wrap the pale column against a dark background, TekniQ logo top-right.
Same lit carved candle, flame steady, glossy multicolored carved scrolls and curls visible around the body.
Continued close shot of the lit carved candle, intricate blue-red-green swirled carvings catching light.
Camera lowers to a fuller view of the elaborately carved multicolored candle (no flame in frame) standing on a coppery turntable, rainbow swirl petals and bead accents.
The ornate carved candle rotates slowly, showing symmetrical layered curls in blue, red, green and white with small silver bead decorations.
Continued slow rotation of the decorative carved candle, deep blue and rainbow-striped carved scrolls filling the frame.
Tilt back up: the carved candle relit at top with flame, full sculpted body of curling colored petals in soft-focus room.
Lit carved candle, tall flame above the white core, ornate blue and rainbow carved curls around the base, shelves blurred behind.
Final hold on the lit hand-carved decorative candle, flame burning above the intricate multicolored sculpted petals.
